description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/cape-modeler/frontend:latest Docker image and defines the stages lint, test, after, and deploy. Add a lint job in the lint stage that runs a before_script copying /app/node_modules into the workspace and then executes npm run lint -- --no-fix. Add a unit job in the test stage that copies node_modules, downloads the Code Climate test‑reporter, makes it executable, runs ./cc-test-reporter before-build, then runs npm run test:unit -- --ci, runs ./cc-test-reporter after-build in after_script, and stores the coverage directory as an artifact. Add an e2e job in the test stage that copies node_modules and runs npm run test:e2e -- --headless --record --key $CYPRESS_RECORD_KEY. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs only on tags, copies node_modules, runs npm run build, moves the generated public folder to public-vue, moves the dist folder to public, and publishes the public directory as a pages artifact.
